title: Statsig Experiment
description: An A/B test experiment configuration with defined groups, parameter values, allocation percentages, and analysis settings. Experiments enable controlled testing of product changes by splitting users into groups and measuring metric impacts.

id.description: The unique identifier of the experiment.

name.description: The name of the experiment, used as the key for SDK evaluation.

description.description: A human-readable description of the experiment and what it tests.

hypothesis.description: The hypothesis being tested, describing the expected outcome of the experiment.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the experiment.

groups.description: The experiment groups defining parameter values for each user segment.

allocation.description: The percentage of eligible users allocated to the experiment.

layerID.description: The layer this experiment belongs to, enabling parameter sharing and mutual exclusivity with other experiments.

targetingGateID.description: The feature gate used to filter which users are eligible for the experiment.

defaultValues.description: The default parameter values returned when a user is not allocated to the experiment.

primaryMetrics.description: The primary metrics used to evaluate the experiment hypothesis.

secondaryMetrics.description: Secondary metrics monitored during the experiment for guardrail and exploratory analysis.

tags.description: Tags for organizing and categorizing the experiment.

targetApps.description: Target applications this experiment is scoped to.

startedTime.description: Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch when the experiment was started.

createdTime.description: Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch when the experiment was created.

lastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch when the experiment was last modified.

ExperimentGroup.description: An experiment group that defines parameter values for a segment of allocated users.

name.description: The name of the group (e.g., control, test, variant_a).

size.description: The percentage of allocated users assigned to this group. All group sizes must sum to 100.

parameterValues.description: The parameter key-value pairs for users in this group.

MetricReference.description: A reference to a metric definition used in experiment analysis.

type.description: The metric type (e.g., event_count, ratio, funnel, mean).

direction.description: The expected direction of change for this metric.
